# About this item

- Specification: Emergency stop push button switch with 4 screw terminals, action type: constricting, contact type: 1 NO + 1 NC, poles: DPST
- EASY TO USE: The emergency stop button with red mushroom cap is compact, quick and easy to use, stops and locks when pressed, and can be reset by simply pressing and turning the arrow.
- Waterproof design: stop switch box with the waterproof rubber ring makes the seal strong and prevents water drops from entering the switch.
- Mushroom diameter: 40 mm / 15.7 inches; total size (approx.): 7.6 x 7.0 x 9.5 cm / 2.99 x 2.76 x 3.74 inches (L x W x H)
- MULTIPLE USAGE - Emergency stop push button can be widely used to control the electromagnetic starter, contactor, relay and other electrical circuits of automatic control.

## Product Description

Specifications:

This emergency stop switch is made of high quality plastic and metal, safe and durable. 4 Screw Terminals, 1 N/O + 1 Opener DPST Contact Type, Red Mushroom Emergency Off Push Switch

1 x PG13.5 waterproof plug.
